entry.title: [EventWire] 6 page(s) may need updating — Judicial Review and Courts Act 2022
entry.summary: 7 GOV.UK page(s) affected by Judicial Review and Courts Act 2022. Start by: 2026-07-27.
entry.content:
Legislative change

Judicial Review and Courts Act 2022

https://www.legislation.gov.uk/ukpga/2022/35

Commencement: 2026-09-07 (for specified purposes; wholly in force)

Start content work by: 2026-07-27

Pages needing attention (6)

  • Being taken to an employment tribunal — guide · action
  • Being taken to an employment tribunal: At the hearing — guide · action
  • Being taken to an employment tribunal: Before the hearing — guide · action
  • Being taken to an employment tribunal: If you disagree with a tribunal decision — guide · action
  • Being taken to an employment tribunal: Legislation — guide · action
  • Being taken to an employment tribunal: If you lose the case — guide · action

entry.title: [EventWire] 1 page(s) may need review — Tobacco and Vapes Act 2026

entry.content:
Legislative change

Tobacco and Vapes Act 2026

https://www.legislation.gov.uk/ukpga/2026/18

Commencement: 2026-10-29 (wholly in force; in force in so far as not already in force)

Pages needing attention (1)
